hypothesis: Combining Supertrend and Donchian channels creates a robust trend vs range filter that prevents entering against the trend. EMA crossovers with narrow Bollinger bands identify mean-reversion opportunities within defined volatility regimes, while Volume Oscillator confirms conviction. This multi-filter approach reduces false signals and improves risk-adjusted returns in 0GUSDC's volatile environment.

Combining Supertrend and Donchian channels creates a robust trend vs range filter that prevents entering against the trend. EMA and Bollinger bands identify mean-reversion opportunities within the filtered regime, while Volume Oscillator confirms conviction. Stochastic provides a contrarian confirmation to avoid false breakouts.

Combining Supertrend and Donchian channels as a regime filter improves mean-reversion entry quality by identifying trending vs ranging markets, reducing false signals during strong trends and increasing profitability in range-bound conditions.

Combining EMA crossover with Bollinger band contraction and volume confirmation creates a robust mean-reversion signal. The supertrend filter ensures we only trade in trending markets, avoiding costly whipsaws in range-bound conditions. Stochastic confirmation adds an additional layer of validation by ensuring momentum aligns with the reversion trade.
